The issue says to update the welcome text in `src/app/(frontend)/page.tsx`. Looking at the current text:
- Line 30: `Welcome to your new project.`
- Line 31: `Welcome back, {user.email}`

The issue title says "Update homepage welcome text repro 1779432801761". The issue body says "Update the welcome text shown on the homepage." but doesn't specify what the new text should be.

Wait - the issue body doesn't actually specify what the new welcome text should be changed TO. It just says to change it. Let me look more carefully... the issue says:
